headline: Duluth Trading taps Amazon for fulfillment on e-commerce giant’s site
summary: The wholesale model aims to enable the workwear retailer to tap into the popularity of Prime shipping while freeing up time to focus on its own digital portfolio and stores.

raw.headline: Duluth Trading taps Amazon for fulfillment on e-commerce giant’s site

headline: DA Davidson Maintains Buy on Tractor Supply, Lowers Price Target to $40
summary: DA Davidson  analyst Michael Baker   maintains Tractor Supply (NASDAQ:TSCO) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $50 to $40.

raw.headline: DA Davidson Maintains Buy on Tractor Supply, Lowers Price Target to $40
raw.summary: DA Davidson  analyst Michael Baker   maintains Tractor Supply (NASDAQ:TSCO) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $50 to $40.

headline: Cramer Passes On NioCorp And SoundHound — But Says One Stock Is 'Time To Buy'
summary: Jim Cramer recommends buying SOFI, and avoiding RIVN and BSX. He also says NIOBF is too speculative, but likes MP and INOD in the data engineering market.
